name: Alert
description:
Always on the lookout for danger, you gain the following benefits:
- **Initiative Proficiency.** You gain proficiency in Initiative.
- **Initiative Swap.** Immediately after you roll Initiative, you can swap your Initiative with the Initiative of one willing ally in the same combat.

name: Magic Initiate
description:
You have learned the basics of magic. You gain the following benefits:
- **Two Cantrips.** You learn two Cantrips of your choice from the Cleric, Druid, or Wizard spell list.
- **Level 1 Spell.** You learn one Level 1 spell of your choice from that same list. You always have it prepared and can cast it once without a spell slot per long rest. You can also cast it using spell slots.
- **Spellcasting Ability.** Choose Intelligence, Wisdom, or Charisma as your spellcasting ability for these spells.

name: Musician
description:
You are a master of musical instruments. You gain the following benefits:
- **Tool Proficiency.** You gain proficiency with three Musical Instruments of your choice.
- **Inspirational Song.** As you finish a Short or Long Rest, you can play a song to give Inspiration to a number of allies equal to your Proficiency Bonus.

name: Savage Attacker
description: You have learned to strike with lethal force. Once per turn when you hit a creature with a weapon, you can roll the weapon's damage dice twice and use either roll.

name: Skilled
description: You gain proficiency in any combination of three Skills or Tool proficiencies of your choice.

name: Tavern Brawler
description:
You are adept at fighting with whatever is at hand. You gain the following benefits:
- **Enhanced Unarmed Strike.** Your unarmed strikes deal 1d4 + Strength modifier damage.
- **Furniture Smasher.** You are proficient with Improvised Weapons.
- **Push.** When you hit a creature with an unarmed strike, you can push them 5 feet away.

name: Ability Score Improvement
description: You increase one ability score of your choice by 2, or two ability scores of your choice by 1. You can't increase a score above 20 using this feat.

name: Actor
description:
Skilled at mimicry and dramatics, you gain the following benefits:
- **Ability Score Increase.** Increase your Charisma score by 1, to a maximum of 20.
- **Mimicry.** You can mimic the speech of another person or the sounds made by other creatures.
- **Performance.** You have Advantage on Charisma (Performance) checks.

name: Charger
description:
You've learned to use your momentum to strike with power. You gain the following benefits:
- **Ability Score Increase.** Increase your Strength or Dexterity score by 1, to a maximum of 20.
- **Improved Dash.** When you take the Dash action, your movement doesn't provoke Opportunity Attacks.
- **Charge Attack.** If you move 10ft in a straight line before an attack, you deal +1d8 damage.

name: Crusher
description:
You are practiced in the art of using bludgeoning weapons. You gain the following benefits:
- **Ability Score Increase.** Increase your Strength or Constitution score by 1, to a maximum of 20.
- **Push.** When you hit a creature with bludgeoning damage, you can move it 5 feet.
- **Critical Crush.** When you score a Critical Hit with bludgeoning damage, attacks against that creature have Advantage until your next turn.

name: Dual Wielder
description:
You master fighting with two weapons. You gain the following benefits:
- **Ability Score Increase.** Increase your Strength or Dexterity score by 1, to a maximum of 20.
- **Enhanced Dual Wielding.** When you take the Attack action and attack with a Light weapon, you can make one extra attack with a different Light weapon as part of the same action.
- **Quick Draw.** You can draw or stow two weapons when you would normally draw or stow one.

name: Grappler
description:
You are a master at close-quarters combat. You gain the following benefits:
- **Ability Score Increase.** Increase your Strength or Dexterity score by 1, to a maximum of 20.
- **Punch and Grab.** When you hit a creature with an Unarmed Strike as part of the Attack action, you can deal damage and also Grapple the target as part of the same attack.
- **Attack Advantage.** You have Advantage on attack rolls against a creature Grappled by you.
- **Fast Wrestler.** Your speed isn't halved while you are dragging or carrying a Grappled creature.

name: Great Weapon Master
description:
You've learned to use the weight of a weapon to your advantage. You gain the following benefits:
- **Ability Score Increase.** Increase your Strength score by 1, to a maximum of 20.
- **Heavy Weapon Mastery.** When you hit a creature with a Heavy weapon as part of the Attack action, you can add your Proficiency Bonus to the damage roll.
- **Hew.** When you score a Critical Hit with a Melee weapon or reduce a creature to 0 HP with one, you can make one melee attack as a Bonus Action.

name: Heavily Armored
description:
You have trained to use Heavy Armor. You gain the following benefits:
- **Ability Score Increase.** Increase your Strength or Constitution score by 1, to a maximum of 20.
- **Armor Proficiency.** You gain proficiency with Heavy Armor.

name: Infiltrator
description:
You are an expert at stealth and infiltration. You gain the following benefits:
- **Ability Score Increase.** Increase your Dexterity score by 1, to a maximum of 20.
- **Infiltrator's Tools.** You gain proficiency with Thieves' Tools.
- **Stalker.** You have Advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks.

name: Inspiring Leader
description:
You can hearten your companions with your words. You gain the following benefits:
- **Ability Score Increase.** Increase your Wisdom or Charisma score by 1, to a maximum of 20.
- **Bolster Allies.** At the end of a Short or Long Rest, you can give Temporary Hit Points to up to six allies equal to your Level + Ability Modifier.

name: Keen Mind
description:
Your mind is a steel trap. You gain the following benefits:
- **Ability Score Increase.** Increase your Intelligence score by 1, to a maximum of 20.
- **Quick Study.** You can take the Search action as a Bonus Action.
- **Memory.** You accurately recall anything seen or heard within the last month.

name: Lightly Armored
description:
You have trained to use Light Armor and Shields. You gain the following benefits:
- **Ability Score Increase.** Increase your Strength or Dexterity score by 1, to a maximum of 20.
- **Armor Proficiency.** You gain proficiency with Light Armor and Shields.

name: Mobile
description:
You are exceptionally fleet of foot. You gain the following benefits:
- **Ability Score Increase.** Increase your Strength or Dexterity score by 1, to a maximum of 20.
- **Speed Increase.** Your walking speed increases by 10 feet.
- **Agile.** When you make a melee attack, you don't provoke Opportunity Attacks from that target for the rest of the turn.

name: Observant
description:
You are highly aware of your surroundings. You gain the following benefits:
- **Ability Score Increase.** Increase your Intelligence or Wisdom score by 1, to a maximum of 20.
- **Quick Search.** You can take the Search action as a Bonus Action.
- **Lip Reading.** You can understand what people are saying by reading their lips.

name: Polearm Master
description:
You are a master of reach weapons. You gain the following benefits:
- **Ability Score Increase.** Increase your Strength or Dexterity score by 1, to a maximum of 20.
- **Butt-End Attack.** When you take the Attack action with a Glaive, Halberd, Quarterstaff, or Spear, you can use a Bonus Action to make a melee attack with the other end (1d4 damage).
- **Reactive Strike.** While you are wielding one of these weapons, creatures provoke an Opportunity Attack when they enter your reach.

name: Resilient
description:
You have developed the stamina to withstand certain effects. You gain the following benefits:
- **Ability Score Increase.** Increase one Ability Score of your choice by 1, to a maximum of 20.
- **Saving Throw Proficiency.** You gain proficiency in Saving Throws using that chosen ability.

name: Sentinel
description:
You are a master at punishing those who try to flee. You gain the following benefits:
- **Ability Score Increase.** Increase your Strength or Dexterity score by 1, to a maximum of 20.
- **Guardian.** When you hit a creature with an Opportunity Attack, the creature's speed becomes 0 for the rest of the turn.
- **Intervene.** When a creature within 5ft makes an attack against a target other than you, you can use your Reaction to make a melee attack against the attacker.

name: Sharpshooter
description:
You are a master of ranged combat. You gain the following benefits:
- **Ability Score Increase.** Increase your Dexterity score by 1, to a maximum of 20.
- **Long Shots.** Attacking at long range doesn't impose Disadvantage on your ranged attack rolls.
- **Cover Ignore.** Your ranged attacks ignore Half and Three-Quarters Cover.

name: Shield Master
description:
You use your shield for both offense and defense. You gain the following benefits:
- **Ability Score Increase.** Increase your Strength score by 1, to a maximum of 20.
- **Shield Bash.** If you take the Attack action, you can use a Bonus Action to shove a creature within 5ft with your shield.
- **Interpose Shield.** When you make a Dexterity Saving Throw against an effect that only targets you, you can add your Shield's AC bonus to the roll.

name: Slasher
description:
You've learned to use slashing weapons to slow your foes. You gain the following benefits:
- **Ability Score Increase.** Increase your Strength or Dexterity score by 1, to a maximum of 20.
- **Hamstring.** When you hit a creature with slashing damage, you can reduce its speed by 10ft.
- **Critical Bleed.** When you score a Critical Hit with slashing damage, the target has Disadvantage on all attacks until your next turn.

name: Speedy
description:
You are exceptionally fast and agile. You gain the following benefits:
- **Ability Score Increase.** Increase your Strength or Dexterity score by 1, to a maximum of 20.
- **Speed Increase.** Your walking speed increases by 10 feet.
- **Dash Maneuver.** When you take the Dash action on your turn, difficult terrain doesn't cost you extra movement for the rest of that turn.

name: Telekinetic
description:
You learn to move things with your mind. You gain the following benefits:
- **Ability Score Increase.** Increase your Intelligence, Wisdom, or Charisma score by 1, to a maximum of 20.
- **Mage Hand.** You learn the *Mage Hand* cantrip. It is invisible and requires no components.
- **Telekinetic Shove.** As a Bonus Action, you can try to telekinetically shove one creature within 30ft (DC 8 + Prof + Ability).

name: Telepathic
description:
You awaken your mind's ability to communicate. You gain the following benefits:
- **Ability Score Increase.** Increase your Intelligence, Wisdom, or Charisma score by 1, to a maximum of 20.
- **Telepathy.** You can speak telepathically to any creature you can see within 60ft.
- **Detect Thoughts.** You can cast *Detect Thoughts* once per long rest without a spell slot.

name: Tough
description: Your hit point maximum increases by an amount equal to twice your level when you gain this feat. Whenever you gain a level thereafter, your hit point maximum increases by an additional 2 hit points.

name: War Caster
description:
You are a master of casting spells in the heat of battle. You gain the following benefits:
- **Ability Score Increase.** Increase your Intelligence, Wisdom, or Charisma score by 1, to a maximum of 20.
- **Combat Concentration.** You have Advantage on Concentration saves.
- **Somatic Components.** You can perform somatic components even with weapons/shields in hand.
- **Reactive Spell.** You can cast a spell as an Opportunity Attack.
